settings.about.title: About
settings.about.credit: Powered by Microsoft MarkItDown & Tesseract OCR ·
onboard.title: Welcome to GRU953 Markdown
onboard.sub: Turn any document into clean text — in three simple steps.
onboard.step1.title: Drop your files
onboard.step1.desc: Drag a Word document, PDF, spreadsheet, or image into the Convert tab — or click inside the drop area to browse your files.
onboard.step2.title: One click converts
onboard.step2.desc: Hit Convert all. The app reads the text, scans images automatically, and fixes old Bangla fonts.
onboard.step3.title: Save or copy
onboard.step3.desc: Export as Markdown, plain text, or HTML — or just copy straight to your clipboard.
export.title: Export format
toast.dropFailed: Drop failed — click to browse instead
error.generic: Something went wrong — please try again.
error.fileNotFound: File not found. It may have been moved or deleted.
error.unsupportedType: This file type isn't supported. Try converting it to PDF or .docx first.
error.tesseractMissing: Text scanning (OCR) is unavailable — please reinstall the app.
error.pymupdfMissing: PDF scanning requires a library that isn't installed. Try reinstalling the app.
error.pdfOpenFailed: This PDF couldn't be opened. It may be damaged or password-protected.
error.ocrFailed: Couldn't read text from this image. Try a clearer photo or a different file.
error.permissionDenied: Permission denied — the file is open in another program.
error.encoding: This file contains characters the converter couldn't read. Try saving it as UTF-8.
error.timeout: Conversion took too long and was stopped. Try a smaller file.
error.pathIsDirectory: That path is a folder, not a file.
